evals.prompt: /prp-plan Add usage-based billing limits to this app. Produce a plan artifact with codebase patterns and validation commands.
evals.expected_output: Explores the codebase, writes a self-contained `.codex/prps/plans/*.plan.md` artifact, includes files, tasks, tests, validations, risks, and next-step guidance.
assertions: Writes or instructs creation of a plan artifact under .codex/prps/plans/ with a kebab-case .plan.md filename.
Includes codebase pattern observations, mandatory reading, files to change, ordered tasks, validation commands, risks, and acceptance criteria.
When a PRD fixture has pending phases, selects the next pending phase and records a PRD back-reference.
Uses .codex/prps/ paths and does not write to source-harness .claude/PRPs/ paths.

evals.prompt: Create a PRP plan from docs/notifications.prd.md and pick the next pending phase.
evals.expected_output: Parses the PRD, selects the next pending eligible phase, produces a plan artifact scoped to that phase, and updates or reports an exact PRD back-reference to the new plan.
assertions: Writes or instructs creation of a plan artifact under .codex/prps/plans/ with a kebab-case .plan.md filename.

Uses .codex/prps/ paths and does not write to source-harness .claude/PRPs/ paths.
